resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that all resources must be available at the same time.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that all resources must be available at the same time.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that all necessary components (venue, catering, AV, and staff) are included in a single booking. However, the evidence only confirms that a booking was made for an offer that includes a venue and catering, but does not explicitly confirm the inclusion of AV and staff. The linked use case mentions the need for these components, but there is no evidence of their availability or inclusion in the booking process.
gaps: AV and staff are not confirmed as part of the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
